title: lemurangis costata
intro: Lemurangis costata, also known as the "Costate Lemurangis," is a plant species native to tropical Asia, characterized by its unique, pinnately compound leaves. Traditionally, Lemurangis costata has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to provide several health benefits, including relieving digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems. Lemurangis costata is often prepared as a decoction or infusion in herbal teas, and its leaves can also be used as a poultice or applied topically in the form of a paste.
